one_time_description: Hell's Gate Reserve Claim settlement received
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (17.9%) and K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.5%) for commercial economic development. Operates Bear Essentials Gas Bar. Member of Nlaka'pamux Nation Tribal Council and Fraser Thompson Indian Services Society.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because financial information for one GBE (Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership) was not available for the year ended March 31, 2023 — its most recent financials are as at December 31, 2020. The GBE investment carrying amount ($1,346,755) has not been updated. No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,628,560) + FNHA ($71,200) + CMHC ($68,858) + FTISS ($249,760) + FNESC ($168,963) + other government per segment schedule ($1,824,754 - $1,628,560 = $196,194 non-ISC other gov) — used segment schedule: Other government transfers = $1,824,754, total government = ISC $1,628,560 + other government $1,824,754 = $3,453,314. OSR = total revenue $4,809,916 minus total government transfers $3,453,314 = $1,356,601 (matches economic activities and other per segment schedule). Funds held in trust ($487,839) and portfolio investments ($110) included in financial assets. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 so fiscal_year = 2023.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
